headlines.text: US and Iran announce deal to end war, reopen Strait of Hormuz; signing set for Friday in Switzerland
Markets soar on Iran peace deal: S&P 500 +1.49%, Nasdaq surges 2.38%, oil tumbles $4+ a barrel
Fox Corp. announces $22 billion acquisition of Roku, combining Tubi and Fox News with 100M+ streaming households
Trump turns 80: UFC Freedom 250 cage fights held on White House South Lawn to celebrate the president's birthday
Newsom accuses Trump of directing DOJ to investigate him and his wife, calls it politically motivated
SpaceX IPO closes today after SPCX debuted at $150 and surged nearly 20% on Friday to close at $161
Trump name removed from Kennedy Center facade in overnight operation after court ruling
G7 summit opens in France as Geneva police fire tear gas at anti-Tesla protesters outside UN ahead of talks
DOJ clears Paramount-Skydance acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery in $110 billion media mega-merger
Olivia Rodrigo drops new album 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' as FIFA World Cup floods TikTok FYPs

breaking.text: BREAKING: US and Iran reach deal to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz. Signing ceremony set for Friday in Switzerland.

stories.hed: US and Iran Declare Deal 'Complete' as Hormuz Prepares to Reopen
stories.dek: Trump posted 'Ships of the World, start your engines' on Truth Social, which is either historic diplomacy or the world's most consequential boat tweet. Iran's foreign minister said the deal is real but also that he doesn't trust anyone — so basically a normal Monday.

stories.hed: G7 Summit Opens in France With Iran Peace Deal Dominating Agenda
stories.dek: World leaders gathered in Evian as Geneva protesters torched a Tesla and smashed windows at a UN agency — a reminder that even peace news comes with property damage. Trump flew from White House UFC fights directly to the summit, an itinerary no protocol manual has ever anticipated.

stories.hed: Newsom Says Trump Ordered DOJ to Investigate Him and His Wife
stories.dek: California Gov. Gavin Newsom went public Monday alleging the Trump DOJ is digging through years of his records without finding a crime, which he attributed to his rumored 2028 presidential ambitions. Federal agents have reportedly knocked on the doors of his family, friends and former employees — a grand jury fishing expedition that Newsom says smells purely political.

stories.hed: Fox Buys Roku for $22 Billion in Landmark Streaming Deal
stories.dek: Fox Corp. announced it will acquire Roku for $160 per share, combining Fox News, Tubi, NFL and MLB rights with Roku's 100 million-plus streaming households — making it the third-largest US TV player by viewership. Fox stock dropped 15% on the news because Wall Street apparently wasn't ready to pay $22 billion to watch people find the Netflix button.

stories.hed: Trump Rang In 80 With Cage Fights on the White House Lawn. Historians Are Having a Moment.
stories.dek: UFC Freedom 250 featured 14 fighters punching each other inside a wire-mesh octagon steps from the Rose Garden, with the Blue Angels flying overhead and Zac Brown singing the anthem. A Cornell classics professor compared it to Imperial Roman gladiatorial games — Trump's camp called that a compliment.

markets.context: Wall Street surged across the board after Trump declared the US-Iran peace deal 'complete,' sending oil prices down more than $4 a barrel and stocks to their best single-day gains in months.

gas.note: Gas is down for the third straight week, but your wallet still hasn't forgiven you for May.

popCulture.hed: Fox Buys Roku for $22B and Trump Hosts UFC on the White House Lawn: America's Week in Surreal
popCulture.dek: Lachlan Murdoch called Fox's Roku acquisition a 'defining moment' while simultaneously Fox News hosts covered Trump staging cage fights on national historic grounds. It is unclear which story will age worse.

genZ.term: Charli XCX Stuck Frame Glitch Edit
genZ.definition: Sparked by Charli XCX's 'Rock Music' drop in May, creators film a clip and sync to the deliberate vocal glitch mid-song, then freeze the highlight moment using Instagram's stuck-frame animation — the result is a chaotic slow-motion meltdown that basically writes itself. The format has dominated June FYPs as the summer's go-to 'things going sideways' meme vehicle.
genZ.usage: Iran's foreign minister discovering Israel struck Beirut the morning of the peace deal signing: *saxophone blasts, freeze frame, glitch edit activates*

tldr: The US and Iran reached a deal to end their 108-day war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, sending stocks surging and oil tumbling on what may be the most consequential Monday since the conflict began. Meanwhile Trump turned 80 with cage fights on the White House lawn, Fox bought Roku for $22 billion, and Gavin Newsom accused the DOJ of hunting for a crime it hasn't found — just a regular American Monday.
